rows.label: qev015602_MSG0001
rows.name: Yay! [ST:playername ]! Good job!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015602_MSG0002
rows.name:
Looks like you got the items
we asked for, ne~! Our
preparations are perfect, too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015602_MSG0003
rows.name:
Lu! The time has finally come to
complete your miracle machine, yo~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015602_MSG0004
rows.name:
Please take care of it! Once
that is complete, it will be
like giving a club to a demon![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015602_MSG0005
rows.name:
It will be of use to the members of BLADE,
and... I am sure it will serve as an excellent
attraction panda to draw customers to my shop.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015602_MSG0006
rows.name:
Okay! Then I'll dash off and make this
special panda Lu thought up, yo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015602_MSG0007
rows.name:
Congratulatio-o-ons! Lu!
It's finally finished, yo~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015602_MSG0008
rows.name:
Oho! We have finished displaying our
proud selection of goods as well![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015602_MSG0009
rows.name:
It seems we can open the
shop at any time now![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015602_MSG0010
rows.name:
...Heheh, what do you think of my
shop? Don't you agree that it is
guaranteed to be a massive success?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015602_JNK0010
rows.name: Interest

rows.label: qev015602_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask for details about the mysterious device Giogion made.

rows.label: qev015602_JNK0020
rows.name: Doubt

rows.label: qev015602_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask about the merchandise Lu handles.

rows.label: qev015602_MSG0011
rows.name:
How rude of me! To think
I forgot to explain![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015602_MSG0012
rows.name:
Every single one of these items
has a history! If I explained them
one by one, dawn would break.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015602_MSG0013
rows.name:
I would very much like to tell
you all about them in detail
when you make a purchase.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015602_MSG0014
rows.name:
For now, please allow me to introduce
this device that Giogion worked on![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015602_MSG0015
rows.name:
This is a revolutionary device that opens
new device slots in Inner weapons, Inner
suits, Doll weapons, and Doll armor![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015602_MSG0016
rows.name:
By using this device, the members of BLADE
should be able to upgrade their current
equipment into something even more powerful![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015602_MSG0017
rows.name:
...Well, seeing is believing, as they say. I
will give you an Attack Assault as a sample,
so please try opening a device slot on it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015602_MSG0018
rows.name:
Alright! We're ready to go anytime,
yo! Let's open! A new slot![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015602_MSG0019
rows.name:
This device is what allows you
to add slots to various pieces
of equipment like this![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015602_MSG0020
rows.name:
It is guaranteed to be needed
by the people of BLADE![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015602_MSG0021
rows.name:
With this, the numerous items
I have gathered should fly off
the shelves as well, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015602_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev015602_SEL0031
rows.name: Nod and agree that things will go exactly as Lu envisions.

rows.label: qev015602_JNK0040
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev015602_SEL0041
rows.name: State frankly that Lu's art pieces probably won't sell.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015602_MSG0022
rows.name:
Thank you very much! I will
deliver these supreme items
to the people all across NLA![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015602_MSG0023
rows.name:
I thought that surely you, of all
people, would understand the supreme
items I have gathered, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015602_MSG0024
rows.name:
...However, I will not be
discouraged! I will sell every
single one of these items![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015602_MSG0025
rows.name:
Lu! Your shop is absolutely
guaranteed to succeed, sa![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015602_MSG0026
rows.name:
Hey? How about it? This thing needs
maintenance, too, so won't you let
me help out at the shop, ne?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015602_MSG0027
rows.name:
Yes, it is exactly as the proverb
says, a wish come true! Let's
liven up this shop together![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015602_MSG0028
rows.name:
[ST:wide ]—Now, it's finally time to open!
It is all thanks to you that
we have made it this far.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015602_MSG0029
rows.name:
Please accept this. And we hope you continue
to utilize our shop in the future![ST:wait ]
